assertions.description: No signal_analysis section at all. Missing: SPI bus (CC2400<->LPC1758), crystal oscillator (X1 16MHz + C19/C21 27pF), LDO regulator (TPS71219 dual 3.3V->1.8V), USB interface (J1 + IP4220CZ6 ESD + R12/R13 33ohm), RF matching (L1/L2/C1-C5 antenna network), 6 LED circuits.
REVIEW: GND net contains wrong pins: J1.VBUS, U1.AVDD_PA1, U1.RF_P, U4.P1[30]/VBUS, U3.AVDD_RF1, U3.RF_N. Power and RF signal pins incorrectly assigned to GND.
REVIEW: 3V3D net contains 5 wrong LPC1758 GPIO pins (P0[11], P0[6], P1[4], P0[18], P1[20]) and U4.XTAL1 (should connect to crystal X1).
REVIEW: 71 of 143 nets (50%) are single-pin orphans (__unnamed_*). Wire-to-pin connectivity resolution fails on half the connections.
REVIEW: All MPNs empty despite source having extensive MPN data in Field2 (F5) entries. CC2400-RTB1, CC2591RGVR, TPS71219DRCT, ABMM2-16.000MHZ-E2-T all present in source but not extracted.
REVIEW: 9 CONN_1 test pad components (P5-P13) have pins=[] - parser fails to extract pins from single-pin connectors.
